'''Chris Rudd''' (born 17 December 1969) is an English former professional [[rugby league]] footballer who usually played as a {{rlp|ce}}.<ref name="Statistics at rugbyleagueproject.org"/> He played for [[Warrington Wolves|Warrington]] at club level between 1988 and 1998, and also represented [[Cumbria rugby league team|Cumbria]] and [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain]] Under-21's.

==Career==
Rudd started his career with amateur club Kells, and played against [[Leeds Rhinos|Leeds]] in the [[1988 Challenge Cup]].<ref>{{cite web|last1=Graham|first1=Helen|title=1988: Kells clash with mighty Leeds|url=http://www.Whitehavenews.co.uk/sports/arl/1988-kells-clash-with-mighty-leeds-1.386992#|website=Whitehaven News|publisher=CN Group|access-date=31 January 2015|date=5 January 2006}}{{Dead link|date=July 2020 |bot=InternetArchiveBot |fix-attempted=yes }}</ref> He signed for [[Warrington Wolves|Warrington]] later that year, and spent ten years with the club, making 169 appearances between 1988 and 1998.<ref>{{cite web|title=Rudd, Chris|url=http://wolvesplayers.thisiswarrington.co.uk/results.asp?code=838|website=Warrington Rugby League RLFC Players Archive|access-date=31 January 2015|url-status=dead|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20150518083346/http://wolvesplayers.thisiswarrington.co.uk/results.asp?code=838|archive-date=18 May 2015}}</ref>

Rudd played for [[Cumbria rugby league team|Cumbria]] in the 10–42 defeat against [[Australia national rugby league team|Australia]] during the [[1990 Kangaroo tour of Great Britain and France|1990 Kangaroo tour]].<ref>{{cite web|title=Kangaroos Tour 1990 Series - Game 1|url=http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/matches/kangaroos-tour-1990/game-1/cumbria-vs-australia.html|website=Rugby League Project|access-date=31 January 2015|url-status=dead|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20140929164421/http://www.rugbyleagueproject.org/matches/kangaroos-tour-1990/game-1/cumbria-vs-australia.html|archive-date=29 September 2014}}</ref> In 1991, he played twice for [[Great Britain national rugby league team|Great Britain]] under-21s against [[France national rugby league team|France]].<ref>{{cite book|author=Fletcher, Raymond|year=1997|title=Rothmans Rugby League Yearbook 1997|publisher=Headline Book Publishing|page=358|isbn=978-0-7472-7764-4}}</ref>
